title: Vance says 'the ball is in Iran's court' to move peace talks further, as U.S. blockade takes effect
summary_full: The U.S. team of Vance and special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner made progress with Iran during the Islamabad talks, the vice president said.
summary_public: The U.S. team of Vance and special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner made progress with Iran during the Islamabad talks, the vice president said.

IR.label: mixed
